description: Full scenario name — one of four disruption scenarios modeled
transformation_notes: No transformation. Labels authored by Ray Garza based on geopolitical and supply chain literature.

description: Single letter code A/B/C/D for Tableau filtering and viz logic
transformation_notes: Assigned by author for ease of filtering. Maps to scenario column.

description: Industry sector affected — 7 sectors modeled
transformation_notes: Sectors selected based on semiconductor end-market consumption data from SIA 2025 Factbook.

description: Estimated percentage of industry chip supply that originates from TSMC fabs
transformation_notes: Industry-level estimate derived from TSMC foundry market share data and end-market chip sourcing reports. Not company-level data.

description: Estimated percentage of critical materials inputs (gallium germanium rare earths) sourced from China
transformation_notes: China produces 94% of global gallium (SRC013) and 83% of germanium. Industry-level exposure varies. Defense lower due to strategic stockpiles.

description: Typical number of days of chip inventory a given industry carries under normal operating conditions
transformation_notes: Automotive JIT: 30-45 days (AlixPartners SRC021). Other sectors estimated from industry reports. Flag as Tier 4 for non-automotive sectors.

description: yes/no — does this industry exhaust chip inventory within 30 days of supply disruption
transformation_notes: Derived from typical_inventory_days. If inventory_days < 30 then yes. Simple threshold logic.

description: yes/no — does this industry exhaust chip inventory within 60 days of supply disruption
transformation_notes: Derived from typical_inventory_days. If inventory_days < 60 then yes.

description: yes/no — does this industry exhaust chip inventory within 90 days of supply disruption
transformation_notes: Derived from typical_inventory_days. If inventory_days < 90 then yes.

description: yes/no — does this industry exhaust chip inventory within 180 days of supply disruption
transformation_notes: All industries hit wall by 180 days in all scenarios. No industry carries 6 months of inventory.

description: Estimated annual semiconductor spend by this industry globally in billions USD
transformation_notes: Figures from SIA 2025 Factbook and industry analyst reports. Verify against SIA publications before publishing.

description: Estimated GDP impact in billions USD if supply disruption extends beyond 90 days
transformation_notes: Mixed tier. Automotive $210B from 2021 actuals (Tier 2). Other sectors modeled proportionally. Flag clearly as estimates.

description: Estimated percentage of industry chip needs covered by US domestic production by 2030 assuming all CHIPS Act projects complete on schedule
transformation_notes: Based on Commerce Dept projection of 20% leading-edge logic coverage by 2030. Sector adjustments derived from CHIPS Act award type distribution.

description: Plain English description of whether scenario is hypothetical active or partially active as of March 2026
example_value: ACTIVE — China banned gallium/germanium exports to US Dec 2024
transformation_notes: Updated to reflect March 2026 geopolitical status. Requires manual update as situation evolves.

description: yes/no/partial — is any component of this scenario already occurring
transformation_notes: Scenario A: no. Scenario B: yes (gray zone active). Scenario C: yes (export controls in effect). Scenario D: partial (earthquakes occurring not catastrophic).

description: Comma-separated list of chip types most exposed in this industry/scenario combination
transformation_notes: Qualitative descriptor. Not exhaustive. For executive communication only.

description: Historical or current event that validates the modeled impact
example_value: 2021 chip shortage caused $210B lost revenue industry-wide
transformation_notes: Sourced from cited references. Each precedent has a corresponding source_id.

description: Inline citation notes for the specific row
transformation_notes: Abbreviated inline citations. Full citations in source_registry.csv.

description: Legal or common name of CHIPS Act award recipient
transformation_notes: Matches SIA tracker naming convention.

description: US state(s) where funded project(s) are located
transformation_notes: Multi-state awards use / separator e.g. OH/AZ/OR/NM

description: City or cities of project location
transformation_notes: Best available from press releases. Some TBD where not publicly announced.

description: Category of semiconductor manufacturing — logic/memory/mature_node/compound/materials/packaging/defense/automotive/rd
transformation_notes: Classification based on project descriptions in SIA tracker and GAO report (SRC006).

description: Total funding announced in preliminary memorandum of terms in billions USD
transformation_notes: PMT amount. May differ from final award due to negotiation.

description: Final signed award amount in billions USD. Zero if not yet finalized.
transformation_notes: Sourced from NIST press releases (SRC008) and SIA tracker (SRC005). Zero for proposed-only rows.

description: Current award status: finalized / proposed / renegotiating
transformation_notes: renegotiating flag applied to Intel based on SRC007 reporting of Trump admin modifications. Verify others against current SIA tracker.

description: Date preliminary memorandum of terms was signed. Format YYYY-MM-DD.
transformation_notes: Sourced from SIA tracker date fields and NIST press release archives.

description: Date final award agreement was signed. Null if not yet finalized. Format YYYY-MM-DD.
transformation_notes: Sourced from NIST press releases (SRC008). Null values are meaningful — they indicate proposed-only status.

description: Expected year of project completion per award documents
transformation_notes: From GAO report milestone analysis (SRC006). Milestones span Nov 2024 through Oct 2033.

description: Qualitative context notes including project description and strategic significance
transformation_notes: Compiled from press releases and tracker descriptions. Not a data field — narrative context only.

description: Stock exchange ticker symbol
transformation_notes: Standard ticker. Samsung uses KRX ticker 005930.KS for Korean exchange.

description: Full company name
transformation_notes: Pulled from yfinance info object.

description: Fiscal year of reported financials
transformation_notes: Calendar year for most. TSMC fiscal year = calendar year. Verify Intel/Samsung fiscal year alignment.

description: Total annual revenue in billions USD
transformation_notes: Pulled from yfinance income statement. Converted from local currency to USD using year-average exchange rate where applicable.

description: Capital expenditure in billions USD — property plant and equipment purchases
transformation_notes: From cash flow statement. Key metric for capex cycle analysis in Panel 1.

description: Research and development expenditure in billions USD
transformation_notes: From income statement. Shows R&D investment trajectory alongside capex.

description: Gross profit as percentage of revenue
transformation_notes: Indicates pricing power and competitive position. TSMC margin expansion is key story.

description: Classification: equipment_maker / foundry / fabless / memory / sub_tier_supplier
transformation_notes: Assigned by author. Used for color coding and filtering in Tableau.

description: Year of trade flow record
transformation_notes: BACI annual data. Most recent complete year in V202401 release.

description: 3-letter ISO country code of exporting country
transformation_notes: Standard ISO 3166-1 alpha-3. TWN=Taiwan KOR=South Korea NLD=Netherlands USA=United States CHN=China.

description: 3-letter ISO country code of importing country
transformation_notes: Same ISO standard.

description: 6-digit Harmonized System product code
transformation_notes: 854231 and 854239 = integrated circuits (chips). 854110-854190 = discrete semiconductor devices.

description: Trade flow value in current USD
transformation_notes: BACI harmonizes export/import reporting discrepancies. Value in current year USD.

description: Human-readable description of HS code product category
example_value: Electronic integrated circuits - processors and controllers
transformation_notes: Added during Spark transformation for readability. Not in raw BACI file.
